summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of RoutineQuest - All 22 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified. Traditional login works for both rafael/admin and gabriela/gabriela. Google OAuth button correctly redirects to auth.emergentagent.com. Mobile responsiveness (hamburger menu, bottom nav) works perfectly. User switching via 'Outra conta' works. All navigation tabs functional.

backend.login_rafael: PASS - rafael/admin login returns token and user data
backend.login_gabriela: PASS - gabriela/gabriela login returns token and user data
backend.register_new_user: PASS - creates new user and returns token
backend.google_auth_endpoint: PASS - /api/auth/google accepts POST, returns 400 for invalid session
backend.data_get_authenticated: PASS - returns user data with valid token
backend.data_put_and_verify: PASS - saves and retrieves data correctly

frontend.login_screen_loads: PASS - RoutineQuest logo, Sign In/Sign Up tabs, Google button visible
frontend.rafael_login: PASS - Login with rafael/admin shows dashboard with 'Good morning, Rafael!'
frontend.gabriela_login: PASS - Login with gabriela/gabriela shows pink-themed dashboard
frontend.desktop_navigation: PASS - All 9 nav items work (Today, Habits, Stats, Journal, Medals, Events, Friends, Customize, Profile)
frontend.mobile_header: PASS - Mobile header with profile info and hamburger button visible
frontend.mobile_bottom_nav: PASS - 4 tabs (Today, Habits, Stats, Journal) work correctly
frontend.hamburger_menu: PASS - Opens with all nav items and Sign Out button
frontend.user_tiles: PASS - Shows known users after first login with 'Outra conta' option
frontend.user_switching: PASS - 'Outra conta' allows switching between users
frontend.categories_display: PASS - All 8 categories shown (Religion, Exercise, Meals, Work, Study, Family, Health, Other)
frontend.stats_page: PASS - Shows Level, XP, Mood History, statistics
frontend.customize_page: PASS - Theme options, accent colors, branding settings visible
frontend.profile_page: PASS - Shows user info with Sign Out button

critical_code_review_comments: Google OAuth uses MOCKED Emergent Auth service (auth.emergentagent.com) - not real Google OAuth
User data (habits, XP, level) appears to be reset - rafael shows Lv.2/100XP instead of expected Lv.10/3685XP from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Google OAuth redirects to auth.emergentagent.com (correct URL). Traditional login works for both users. Mobile responsiveness verified - hamburger menu and bottom nav work. User switching via 'Outra conta' works. Categories display correctly. Note: User data may have been reset - rafael shows Lv.2 instead of Lv.10.

mocked_apis.Google OAuth: Uses Emergent Auth (auth.emergentagent.com) which provides a MOCKED but realistic OAuth flow
